codeReview.summary: All four guide pages were created and committed in commit 5c460fe. The files exist on disk with the expected content covering all required aspects.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker committed the docs alongside unrelated WebGL changes in a single commit (5c460fe). The handoff claims the docs were 'committed by previous worker' but the actual commit 5c460fe was made by the owner (igorls). The docs files appear to have been created by a prior commit on a different branch and merged into main.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git log --follow shows only 5c460fe touching docs/guides/*.md, but the commit message says 'fix: WebGL arc thickness' with no mention of docs. This suggests the docs were committed in a mixed commit alongside WebGL fixes.

summary: All four guide pages (basic-usage, security, totp, tailscale) are present on disk and cover all required aspects. basic-usage.md documents all 9 CLI flags (--port, --secret, --no-secret, --no-totp, --totp-reset, --no-approval, --dev/--allow-localhost, --tailscale, --quiet). security.md covers all 4 security modes with use cases. totp.md explains TOTP setup and QR code flow. tailscale.md documents serve and funnel options. The only non-blocking issue is that ignoreDeadLinks was added to config.ts to allow cross-references to pages not yet created by other workers — this should be removed once those pages exist.
